founder_submit_commands.recommended_python:
cd ~/Desktop/Noetfield-Systems/SourceA && python3 <<'EOF'
import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from hub_form_submit_v1 import submit_founder_picks

overrides = json.loads(Path('/Users/sinakazemnezhad/Desktop/Noetfield-Systems/sina-governance-SSOT/SG-Canonical-Library/noetfield-library/P99-LEDGER/SOURCEA_FORM_OFFICIAL_SUBMIT_MAP_SIMPLIFIED_2026-07-07.json').read_text())['overrides']
# Optional founder-fact overrides before submit:
# overrides['ENF-14'] = 'A'  # if LinkedIn updated
# overrides['Q-MF-10'] = 'A'  # if Mail sent
# overrides['Q-WBC-OCRE-L3'] = 'A'  # if founder Mail sent

result = submit_founder_picks(
    overrides=overrides,
    partial_batch=True,
    actor='founder',
    channel='founder_cli',
    cascade_hub=False,
    background_wire=True,
)
print(json.dumps(result, indent=2))
EOF
